    M

    Mage - Class in pieces
    Represents a Mage piece within the Kuroshiro engine.
    Mage(Color, Position) - Constructor for class pieces.Mage
    Initializes a new Mage piece.
    MageTest - Class in pieces
    Unit tests for the Mage piece.
    MageTest() - Constructor for class pieces.MageTest
     
    main - package main
     
    main(String[]) - Static method in class main.Main
    The main execution method that starts the Java application.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class ui.ChessApp
    Static launcher method mandated by the JavaFX framework to initialize the GUI thread.
    Main - Class in main
    The primary entry point for the Kuroshiro application.
    Main() - Constructor for class main.Main
     
    makeMove(Position, Position) - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Attempts to perform a standard non-combat movement for a piece.
    Moveable - Interface in core
    Defines the contract for any entity capable of movement within the Kuroshiro game engine.
    movePiece(Piece, Position) - Method in class core.Board
    Moves a piece from its current location to a new destination on the board.
    MoveResult - Class in core
    Encapsulates the complete outcome of an attempted action (move, shoot, or stab) within the Kuroshiro game engine.
    MoveResult.Status - Enum Class in core
    Represents the specific state or error code resulting from an action attempt.
